scripts.build: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run-many -t build
scripts.typecheck: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run-many -t typecheck
scripts.test: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run-many -t test
scripts.rust:build: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run rust:build
scripts.rust:check: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run rust:check
scripts.rust:test: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run rust:test
scripts.rust:wasm: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx run rust:wasm-build
scripts.ide:dev: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx dev ide
scripts.ide:build: env NX_DAEMON=false NX_ISOLATE_PLUGINS=false nx build ide
